## Inferred ActorOpen roadmap

These are the first bunches seen on each actor channel — i.e., the **409 actor-spawn bunches Session H must learn to synthesise**.  Every subsequent bunch on that channel is a property delta against that actor.

## Session H roadmap implied by this catalog

Phase → packet category → synthesiser needed:

| Phase | Packet category | Existing code | Gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| H.2 | NMT_Challenge (code 3) | `handle_nmt_hello` stub | build_nmt_challenge emitter |
| H.2 | NMT_Welcome (code 1)   | `handle_nmt_login` stub | build_nmt_welcome emitter |
| H.2 | NMT_NetGUIDAssign (code 14) | none | build_netguid_assign emitter |
| H.3 | ACTOR_OPEN             | `ActorBuilder::build_spawn` ✓ | chain PC→Pawn→PS on NMT_Join |
| H.4 | ACTOR_DATA             | `build_delta` (root only) | component-scoped deltas + FFastActorLocationArray |
| H.4 | PARTIAL_*              | `bunch_reassembler` ✓ | outgoing partial-fragment builder |
| H.4 | ACTOR_CLOSE            | `build_destroy` ✓ | trigger on disconnect/despawn |

*Produced by `catalog_bootstrap.py` — re-run after each phase to track coverage.*
